tasks.title: Create image audit list for Crystal
tasks.description: Script to check which recipes lack good featured images and have few usable frames. Deliver list to Crystal.

tasks.title: SEO keyword research for blog posts
tasks.description: Research keywords for blog posts. Determine groupings (high protein, quick meals, etc.). Identify which keywords to target and avoid cannibalization.

tasks.title: Set up GA4 + Search Console
tasks.description: Create GA4 property, add Measurement ID to Framer Site Settings. Verify Search Console with HTML meta tag in Framer custom code. Submit sitemap.xml. Do this early so data starts collecting ASAP.

tasks.title: Create UTM naming convention doc
tasks.description: Define consistent UTM parameters for Instagram, YouTube, etc. so all future links are trackable.

tasks.title: Categorize recipes into keyword-targeted groups
tasks.description: Using keyword research, map recipes to blog post groupings. Prioritize which recipes need QA first.

tasks.title: Fix recipe detail page - rich text conversion
tasks.description: Change components to accept rich text for easier editing in Framer CMS.

tasks.title: Fix card component image issue
tasks.description: Address tall/portrait phone images not fitting card components. Options: CSS object-fit cropping, aspect ratio containers, or image guidelines for Crystal.

tasks.title: Resize images on detail pages
tasks.description: Recipe and blog detail page images are too large - constrain dimensions.

tasks.title: Start sourcing missing recipe images
tasks.description: Nicholas provides the list of recipes needing images. Find or photograph replacements.

tasks.title: Begin recipe QA - priority recipes first
tasks.description: Start with recipes identified for blog posts. Check FAQ, nutrition, writing quality. Estimated 30-60 min per recipe.

tasks.title: Finish footer component
tasks.description: Build self-contained Framer component with nav links, social links, copyright.

tasks.title: Finish mobile menu dropdown
tasks.description: Update/fix the mobile navigation menu.

tasks.title: Build about me page layout + component
tasks.description: Page layout and info section on homepage.

tasks.title: Add home page hero image
tasks.description: Add featured image/hero to homepage.

tasks.title: Build blog detail page
tasks.description: New page for blog posts (not recipes). Basic CMS detail page.

tasks.title: Build Popular Recipes featured section on homepage
tasks.description: Component linking to popular/featured recipes. Could link to dedicated category pages.

tasks.title: Fix CMS tagging issues
tasks.description: Tag the 13 untagged recipes, fix 8 broken FAQs, add missing Cuisine tags.

tasks.title: Add related/more recipes section to recipe detail
tasks.description: Section at bottom of recipe pages showing related recipes.

tasks.title: Continue recipe QA/proofreading
tasks.description: Target: finish at least 20 recipes this week.

tasks.title: Continue sourcing images
tasks.description: Priority on recipes that will be in the first blog posts.

tasks.title: Dedicated category pages (breakfast, lunch, dinner)
tasks.description: IF SEO research shows this is valuable. May just be filtered views with unique URLs and meta descriptions. Decision from Week 1 research.

tasks.title: Generate privacy policy + legal pages
tasks.description: Research requirements, generate pages, add to site. Terms of service, privacy policy, cookie notice, disclaimers.

tasks.title: Write blog post #1
tasks.description: Listicle-style post linking to site recipes. Based on keyword research.

tasks.title: Write blog post #2
tasks.description: Second listicle post, different keyword target.

tasks.title: Write blog post #3
tasks.description: Third listicle post, different keyword target.

tasks.title: Upload all images to Framer CMS
tasks.description: Select best frames from extracted images, upload, assign to recipes.

tasks.title: Finish recipe QA/proofreading
tasks.description: Target: all 45 recipes reviewed by end of week.

tasks.title: Review and approve blog post drafts
tasks.description: Read through blog posts, provide feedback.

tasks.title: Finalize about me page copy
tasks.description: Write or approve about page content.

tasks.title: Deliver all sourced images
tasks.description: All missing/replacement images delivered by end of week.

tasks.title: Final Framer assembly
tasks.description: Connect all components to CMS, verify all pages work, test all filters/navigation.

tasks.title: Write meta descriptions for all pages
tasks.description: Unique meta title (<60 chars) and description (<160 chars) for: homepage, about, recipe list, each recipe, blog list, each blog post, legal pages. For CMS pages, add SEO_Title and SEO_Description fields.

tasks.title: Add Recipe JSON-LD structured data
tasks.description: Add structured data via Collection Page Settings Custom Code head. Use CMS dynamic variables with json filter. Include: name, image, author, times, yield, ingredients, instructions, nutrition. Add ISO 8601 duration fields if needed.

tasks.title: Responsive testing
tasks.description: Test mobile, tablet, desktop across browsers.

tasks.title: Performance optimization
tasks.description: Image optimization, loading speed, Core Web Vitals.

tasks.title: Final QA pass
tasks.description: Click through every page, every recipe, every filter. Fix bugs.

tasks.title: Validate JSON-LD + analytics
tasks.description: Run Google Rich Results Test on 3-5 recipes. Verify GA4 real-time report shows data. Confirm Search Console verified and sitemap submitted. Test one UTM link.

tasks.title: Domain/DNS setup
tasks.description: Point domain to Framer, SSL, etc.

tasks.title: Final content review
tasks.description: Review entire site before launch.

tasks.title: Social media launch prep
tasks.description: Prepare announcement posts for Instagram, YouTube, etc.

tasks.title: Tag 13 completely untagged recipes
tasks.description: 13 recipes have zero tags assigned. Add appropriate Diet, Category, and Cuisine tags.

tasks.title: Fix 8 broken FAQ fields
tasks.description: 8 recipes have '[object Object]' in FAQ data. Fix the serialization issue.

tasks.title: Add missing Cuisine tags to 20 recipes
tasks.description: 52% of recipes are missing Cuisine tags. Review and assign appropriate cuisine classifications.

tasks.title: Reconcile 45 vs 38 recipe discrepancy
tasks.description: Main CSV has 45 recipes but CMS Schema only has 38. Identify and add the 7 missing recipes.

tasks.title: Import final CSV to Framer CMS
tasks.description: Import the final, corrected CSV with all 45 recipes into Framer CMS.

tasks.title: Determine if dedicated category pages are worth building
tasks.description: Based on SEO research, decide if breakfast/lunch/dinner need dedicated pages or just filtered views.

tasks.title: Research privacy policy / legal requirements
tasks.description: Determine what legal pages are needed for a food blog with analytics.

tasks.title: Add SEO_Title and SEO_Description CMS fields
tasks.description: Add Plain Text fields for SEO_Title and SEO_Description to recipe and blog CMS collections.

tasks.title: Bind CMS SEO fields in Collection Page Settings
tasks.description: Set Title to {{SEO_Title}} and Description to {{SEO_Description}} in Collection Page Settings for dynamic meta tags.

tasks.title: OG images for social sharing
tasks.description: Create default OG image and per-page social sharing images.

tasks.title: Add Alt text to each image
tasks.description: this is important for SEO so that each image has a description

tasks.title: Add social preview images (OG images) for each page
tasks.description: Create and add Open Graph / social media preview images for all site pages (homepage, recipe pages, blog posts, about, etc.) so links shared on social media display proper thumbnails.
